violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked or labeled to identify contents. - Sandwiches and food items in refrigerator & walk-in cooler were not labeled or dated.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Air fryer, pizza oven, microwaves, and all other cooking equipment in need of more thorough and frequent cleanings.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked or labeled to identify contents. - Sandwiches and subs in refrigerator were not labeled or dated.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - All cooking equipment in need of deep cleaning inside and out.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
